issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as network failures or missing nmap.
Instructions assume a bash environment, which may not be available on Windows without additional setup.

scenarios.name: Initial recon on an authorized /24 subnet
scenarios.rationale: Treatment follows the documented host-discovery (-PR -sn) -> service scan (-A -T4) -> vuln scan (--script vuln) progression with -oA/-oX output and an authorization reminder, while the baseline runs a single broad scan with no staging or XML output.

scenarios.name: TLS Heartbleed check on a specific host
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented `nmap --script ssl-heartbleed -p 443 <host>` invocation with -oX for parsing, while the baseline sidesteps nmap entirely and falls back to openssl/Python, missing every rubric check.
